behavior_summary: This script implements the runtime behavior and dialogue for the NPC Shaana (an executioner). It provides: a U8P_SHAANA::look/description handler, a time-of-day U8P_SHAANA::schedule chooser, fast-area entry/exit triggers that drive short ambient groans or roaming/pathfinding behavior, a roaming/taunt routine with animations and barks, and a multi-part conversation system triggered by player 'U8P_SHAANA::use' (talk).
Look: returns a corpse descriptor when the NPC is dead; otherwise prefers a known name (shaanaName), then a job/title (shaanaJob), and finally a generic descriptor.

Fast-area entry (U8P_SHAANA::enterFastArea) either runs a short groan monologue on specific map/plot conditions or resets engine refs and launches roaming/pathfinding logic (U8P_SHAANA::func029E), possibly forcing an activity change; U8P_SHAANA::leaveFastArea cleans up refs.
Schedule: U8P_SHAANA::schedule() chooses a U8P_SHAANA::schedule based on FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod and, when a helper returns a valid result, writes shaanaSchedule and calls a commit helper.

Roaming/motion (U8P_SHAANA::func029E) loops pathfinding attempts, calling U8P_SHAANA::func03B0 (taunt/monologue) on some successful attempts and spawning retry timers on failures; U8P_SHAANA::func03B0 runs animation/taunt sequences with random barks.

Dialogue: U8P_SHAANA::use() gates conversation by plot flags (toranDead) and map/scene flags, issues short non-interactive lines on some map conditions, or delegates to two richer dialog routines (U8P_SHAANA::func0973 for initial contact and U8P_SHAANA::func2A16 for repeat interactions) that manage menus, choices, and state flags like shaanaMet, shaanaName, and shaanaBored.
notable_control_flow: U8P_SHAANA::look (process): if Npc::isDead(this) => corpse text; else if global shaanaName set => show name; else if shaanaJob set => show job/title; else show generic 'woman'.

U8P_SHAANA::enterFastArea (process): if isDead OR (map==0x03 and devonInRule==0) => no action; else if map==0x03 and devonInRule==1 => call U8P_SHAANA::func08CD; else reset refs (FREE::resetRef), spawn Npc::cSetActivity(0x00,this) and call U8P_SHAANA::func029E.

U8P_SHAANA::schedule (process): guarded by toranDead / isDead / secondexecution combination; selects parameters based on FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod, calls METHOD::func143A, checks process_result(), and on success sets shaanaSchedule = chosen value and calls METHOD::func133F.

U8P_SHAANA::func029E (utility): loop (local2 from 0 to <=7) spawn Npc::pathfind and suspend; on success call U8P_SHAANA::func03B0 when local2==1 or 3 else METHOD::func15E7; on failure spawn FREE::func1C19 with different delays and then METHOD::func15E7; increment attempt counter and repeat.

U8P_SHAANA::use (process): if not toranDead => return early; special-case short conversation/groan on map 0x03 when devonInRule==0; otherwise compute a small counter from hydrosFree/hasHeart/pyrosFree and either bark alarm lines or dispatch to U8P_SHAANA::func0973 (first meeting) or U8P_SHAANA::func2A16 (repeat meeting).
open_questions: Exact semantics and return values of METHOD::func143A and METHOD::func133F (they appear to compute and apply a U8P_SHAANA::schedule choice, but details of inputs/returned index are inferred).
Precise intended meanings of U8P_SHAANA::schedule numeric constants passed into METHOD::func143A and how shaanaSchedule values map to in-world behaviors/waypoints.
Whether any other scripts or map systems rely on shaanaSchedule beyond this script (external dependents unknown).
The full content and text of some low-confidence 'Unknown' nodes (suspend/temporary blocks) that could slightly alter timing or conditional ordering in U8P_SHAANA::func029E and U8P_SHAANA::func03B0.

main_function.name: U8P_SHAANA::look
main_function.purpose: Return the short description shown when the player 'looks at' Shaana: corpse text if dead; otherwise prefer a stored name (shaanaName), then job/title (shaanaJob), finally a generic description.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine on a player 'U8P_SHAANA::look' or inspect action for this NPC.
Branches depend on Npc::isDead(this) and the presence of global flags shaanaName and shaanaJob.

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::schedule
function_map.role: time-of-day U8P_SHAANA::schedule selection and commit (writes shaanaSchedule)

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::enterFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area entry trigger: decides groan vs roaming and forces activity changes

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::func029E
function_map.role: roaming/pathfinding and retry/timer logic; invokes taunt routine on certain successes

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::func03B0
function_map.role: monologue/taunt animation sequence with barks and timed steps

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::use
function_map.role: player 'U8P_SHAANA::use' (talk) entry point: gating and dispatch to dialogue routines or short groan branch

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::func0973
function_map.role: initial dialogue routine: builds menus, loops on Ask, sets shaanaMet/shaanaName/shaanaBored and responds to options

function_map.name: U8P_SHAANA::func2A16
function_map.role: follow-up / repeat dialogue routine similar to U8P_SHAANA::func0973: manages repeated conversation interactions and menu updates

internal_calls.purpose: Play a short groan/monologue when on map 0x03 and devonInRule==1 (map-specific ambient reaction).
Launch roaming/pathfinding behavior after resetting refs and possibly forcing an activity change.
Trigger taunt/monologue sequences on certain successful pathfind attempts (local2 == 1 or 3).
Dispatch to initial conversation/menu when player first speaks to Shaana (shaanaMet not set).
Dispatch to follow-up/repeat conversation when shaanaMet is already set.

external_calls.purpose: Check if the NPC is dead to select corpse vs living description.
Check current map id to choose map-specific behavior (map==0x03).
Clear engine references for this NPC before spawning activity/process or running behavior helpers (cleanup).
Spawn a process to force the NPC's activity/state when entering the fast area (pid stored and waited on).
Determine time-of-day branch for U8P_SHAANA::schedule selection.
Query/compute available U8P_SHAANA::schedule choices (suspends and later checked via process_result()).
Apply/commit the chosen U8P_SHAANA::schedule after shaanaSchedule is set.
Attempt movement/pathfinding to a destination; success/failure controls further behavior.
Spawn delayed helper/timer on pathfind failure (used for retry/backoff).
Drive animations/waits or advance NPC behavior steps during the taunt/monologue sequence.
Trigger animation/combat-like actions in the taunt sequence (inferred).
Spawn a timer/delayed helper to U8P_SHAANA::schedule groan timing before emitting the final bark.
Used around conversation barks/waits in short conversation branch (timing/animation helper).
Add a map-specific dialogue option when NPC is on map 0x08.
Called during dialog flow (likely animation helper); precise U8P_SHAANA::use in dialog is not fully explicit.
Randomly vary barks and timing choices in monologue/taunt/groan behaviors.

reads.name: toranDead
reads.likely_effect: Gate whether Shaana will engage in conversation/U8P_SHAANA::use handling (when false, U8P_SHAANA::use() returns early).

reads.name: devonInRule
reads.likely_effect: Used with a map check (map==0x03) to select a special groan/monologue path in U8P_SHAANA::enterFastArea.

reads.name: shaanaName
reads.likely_effect: If set, used by U8P_SHAANA::look() to display the NPC's name and by dialogues to conditionally show 'Who are you?' option or alternate greeting.

reads.name: shaanaJob
reads.likely_effect: Used by U8P_SHAANA::look() as a fallback descriptor (job/title 'executioner') when shaanaName is not set.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Contributes to an interaction counter in U8P_SHAANA::use() that can change the dialogue outcome (inferred: increments local4).

reads.name: hasHeart
reads.likely_effect: Contributes to the same counter in U8P_SHAANA::use() and triggers a specific warning line when set.

reads.name: pyrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Contributes to the same counter in U8P_SHAANA::use() (inferred role).

reads.name: secondexecution
reads.likely_effect: Used in U8P_SHAANA::schedule() guard logic to determine whether scheduling should run (inferred guard variable).

writes.name: shaanaSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Stores the selected U8P_SHAANA::schedule index/state for Shaana; written by U8P_SHAANA::schedule() when the U8P_SHAANA::schedule selection helper returns a result.

writes.name: shaanaMet
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player begins conversation; marks that the player has met Shaana and routes future U8P_SHAANA::use() calls to the follow-up dialog routine.

writes.name: shaanaName
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player asks 'Who are you?' to record that Shaana's name is now known (affects U8P_SHAANA::look text and future dialogue).

writes.name: shaanaBored
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player repeatedly ignores or gives empty input, causing Shaana to end the conversation or become curt in future interactions.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the runtime behavior and dialogue for the NPC Shaana (an executioner). It provides: a U8P_SHAANA::look/description handler, a time-of-day U8P_SHAANA::schedule chooser, fast-area entry/exit triggers that drive short ambient groans or roaming/pathfinding behavior, a roaming/taunt routine with animations and barks, and a multi-part conversation system triggered by player 'U8P_SHAANA::use' (talk).
